title: Premier League cricket action for the weekend
description: GEORGE NEWS - The fifth round of the Six Gun...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The fifth round of the Six Gun Grill SWD Premier League will be contested this weekend. The two undefeated teams in the competition, Union Stars I and Sussex, will be in action at the Bridgton Sports Ground. This promises to be an interesting contest.


> The match between Pacaltsdorp United and Knysna Cavaliers has been re-scheduled because of Pacaltsdorp's involvement in the Western Cape T20 Community Cup play-offs.


The fixtures for Saturday are:

Premier League

George vs Union Stars II, Harlequins Forces vs Plett Pioneers and Union Stars I vs Sussex, Pacaltsdorp United vs Knysna Cavaliers (rescheduled)

Promotion League

Thembalethu vs Heidelberg United, Pirates United vs New Dawn Park, Ramblers vs Bongolethu

Women's Division 1

Union Stars vs Pacaltsdorp United

Women's Division 2

Knysna Cavaliers vs Riversdale

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
